allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Records count:', j.records?.length, '| Sample:', j.records?.[0]?.title\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('OK - Registros:', j.records?.length, '| Primeiro:', j.records?.[0]?.title\); }catch\(e\){ console.log\('RAW:', d.slice\(0,200\)\); }}\)")
